mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, email, user_pic, bio, phone, role, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, email, user_pic, bio, phone, role, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{userPic}, #{bio}, #{phone}, #{role, typeHandler=com.itniuma.bitinn.config.MyBatisTypeHandlerConfig$UserRoleTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.itniuma.bitinn.config.MyBatisTypeHandlerConfig$UserStatusTypeHandler}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
